hero_headline: Eliminate production incidents before they happen.
hero_subheadline: Close the loop between post-mortems and code. The Loop transforms incident knowledge into active guardrails in your CI/CD pipeline.
problem_headline: Don't let history repeat itself in your code.
problem_body: Your team writes detailed post-mortems after every incident. But that knowledge stays in Notion docs and Confluence pages — never reaching the developer at the moment they're about to introduce the same pattern that caused the last outage. The Loop changes that.
layer1_description: Deterministic Semgrep rules derived from real production incidents. Runs in pre-commit and CI. Every finding links to the original incident. No AI hallucinations — pure pattern matching.
layer2_description: AI-powered review that compares your pull request against a knowledge base of past incidents. Posts non-blocking comments with matched incidents, confidence scores, and remediation guidance.
layer3_description: When the same pattern is flagged across multiple PRs, The Loop automatically generates a new static rule and opens a PR for human approval. The system learns and hardens over time.
how_headline: The feedback loop that makes your code safer.
how_description: Every production incident becomes a guardrail. Post-mortems feed the knowledge base. The knowledge base generates rules and advisories. Rules block known anti-patterns. Advisories catch semantic similarities. And when new patterns emerge, they become new rules. The loop never stops.
integration_github_desc: GitHub App with Check Runs, SARIF reports, and PR review comments.
integration_ide_desc: Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf — scan code and get advisories directly in your editor.
integration_rest_desc: REST API with webhook support. SARIF and JSON output.
pricing_headline: Start free. Pay as you grow.
waitlist_headline: Be the first to close the loop.
waitlist_subheadline: Join the waitlist and get early access when we launch.
form_success: You're on the list! We'll notify you when The Loop launches.
form_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a minute.
form_server_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
meta_title: The Loop — Eliminate production incidents before they happen
meta_description: Close the loop between post-mortems and code. Transform incident knowledge into active guardrails in your CI/CD pipeline.
constitution_subheadline: The engineering principles that govern every line of code in The Loop. No exceptions. No workarounds.
constitution_mandate_1_desc: One branch. Always production-ready. Every change goes through review and automated verification before reaching users.
constitution_mandate_2_desc: Every visual element follows a centralized design system. No ad-hoc styles. Consistency is enforced, not hoped for.
constitution_mandate_3_desc: Every branch follows a strict naming convention. Features, fixes, hotfixes, chores — each has its place. No ambiguity.
constitution_mandate_4_desc: The main branch is sacred. No force pushes. No skipping checks. Every merge requires approval and passing automated gates.
constitution_mandate_5_desc: Every pull request requires explicit human approval. No exceptions — not for bots, not for automation, not for anyone.
constitution_mandate_6_desc: One environment: production. There is no staging, no preview. If it's merged, it's live. This forces rigor at every step.
constitution_mandate_7_desc: Lint. Type-check. Test. Build. Security scan. Documentation check. All gates must pass. If any fails, the merge is blocked.
constitution_mandate_8_desc: Security at four layers: repository, CI/CD pipeline, application runtime, and cloud infrastructure. HTTPS only. No hardcoded secrets. Least privilege everywhere.
constitution_mandate_9_desc: Small functions. Descriptive names. Zero dead code. No magic numbers. Tests as documentation. Violations are enough to reject a change.
constitution_mandate_10_desc: Domain logic has zero external dependencies. Ports define contracts. Adapters connect to the real world. Clean boundaries, testable by design.
constitution_mandate_11_desc: Every spec, every decision, every phase is documented and preserved. Nothing is deleted — obsolete docs are archived. The project's history is sacred.
constitution_mandate_12_desc: Docs are treated with the same rigor as code. Structural changes require doc updates in the same PR. A CI gate enforces it.
constitution_transparency_text: This constitution lives in our public repository.
constitution_transparency_link: Read the full document on GitHub.
constitution_meta_description: The engineering principles that govern The Loop. Trunk-based dev, rigorous CI, mandated security, clean code, and more.
incident_conflict: This incident was modified by another user. Please reload and try again.
incident_rate_limited: Too many requests. Please try again later.
incident_delete_confirm_body: Are you sure you want to delete this incident? This action will soft-delete it from the list.
incident_delete_active_rule: Cannot delete: this incident has an active Semgrep rule linked.
